messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).
Who is traditionally credited with writing the Symposium?

The Symposium (會飲篇) is traditionally attributed to Plato. It is one of his well-known dialogues, depicting a series of speeches on the nature of love (eros) delivered at a banquet. Although Socrates is a central character in the dialogue, Socrates himself wrote nothing — Plato is the author who composed and attributed the words to him. The attribution to Plato carries a reasonable level of scholarly confidence.
